productDisplayName: Timex Expedition Men Black Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with circular stainless steel case, has a fixed bezelDial style: Charcoal grey dial, has red and white markings, steel toned hour and minute hands with glow-in-the-dark inlay, red seconds hand, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, date aperture at the 3 hour mark, Indiglo night light, shock resistantStrap style: Black, water resistant, leather strap with stitched detail and a tang claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
